response.global_analysis: The video is a credit scroll for the 'hololive production COUNTDOWN LIVE 2025▷2026' featuring a medley of songs. The Reference JSON provides a list of song titles and performers seen on screen. The audio contains instrumental versions of the songs mentioned in the credits, specifically 'Our Bright Parade' is playing during the later part of the credits. I am transcribing the on-screen text for the songs and performers as they appear, and the final message at the end of the video. The timing of the song titles and performer credits is aligned with their appearance on screen. The final message at the end of the video is also transcribed and translated.
